theme: Evaluate a fixed polynomial with fewest multiplies
title: Reshape a Fixed Polynomial: Fewest Online Multiplications
strategies: trivial: compute every power x^2..x^d independently from scratch, scale, sum (d(d-1)/2 nonscalar mults)
greedy: Horner's rule, one nonscalar multiply per degree (d mults) -- the textbook 'optimal' that is the trap
strong: Paterson-Stockmeyer baby-step/giant-step -- precompute x^2..x^k, form blocks with free scalar ops, Horner in y=x^k (~2*sqrt(d) mults)
invalid: emit a program that is not identically p(x)
